description:
Query the Nuxeo Platform's audit trail system to compile a history report for all documents in the '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects' workspace. Compile the audit history (provenance) for at least 2 distinct documents found in the workspace into a JSON file saved at '/home/ga/audit_report.json'.

The JSON file must follow this exact structure:
{
  "report_title": "Projects Workspace Audit Report",
  "generated_at": "<ISO-8601 timestamp>",
  "workspace_path": "/default-domain/workspaces/Projects",
  "total_entries": <integer count>,
  "entries": [
    {
      "document_title": "<dc:title>",
      "document_path": "<doc path>",
      "event_id": "<e.g. documentCreated>",
      "event_date": "<ISO-8601 date>",
      "principal": "<username>",
      "category": "<event category>"
    }
  ]
}
